mapper.sql: p.id, p.thumbnail_url, p.name, p.price, p.stock_quantity, p.created_at, c.type
FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY
p.deleted_at DESC, p.id DESC
p.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (thumbnail_url, category_id, name, price, stock_quantity) VALUES (#{product.thumbnailUrl}, #{product.categoryId}, #{product.name}, #{product.price}, #{product.stockQuantity})
mapper.select:
SELECT , c.id AS category_id, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at
WHERE p.id = #{productId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE products SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id IN
#{productId}
